question: I wanted to check back on our previous conversation about Netflix. I mentioned that I wanted to be able to access all seasons of old shows? Do you remember what show I used as an example, the one that only had the last season available?

retrieval_results.context:
The interviewee would like Netflix to keep all seasons of older shows available, citing the removal of earlier seasons of 'Doc Martin' as an example of missing content.
The interviewee believes that Netflix should always provide more choice, but currently has no complaints about the variety of genres and types of shows and movies offered.
The interviewee finds Netflix's feature that shows upcoming releases for the next week and next month useful and considers the platform a good service overall.
The interviewee experiences occasional access issues with Netflix, such as being unable to open the app and needing to restart after a short period.
The interviewee prefers watching series over movies on Netflix, and currently enjoys the series 'Black List', indicating a particular interest in that show.
The interviewee thinks Netflix offers good value for money, although they are unaware of the exact subscription cost.
The interviewee enjoys Netflix because it offers something for everyone and provides new content daily, reflecting a strong appreciation for the platform's constant updates.
The interviewee has no opinion on whether Netflix has positively impacted their entertainment consumption.
The interviewee has no specific thoughts or opinions about Netflix's original programming.
